mapper.select: SELECT v.route_no, v.vehicle_id, va.driver_id_1, d1.name AS driver_name_1, va.driver_id_2, d2.name AS driver_name_2 FROM hd_bus_vehicle v LEFT JOIN hd_vehicle_assignment va ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN hd_driver d1 ON va.driver_id_1 = d1.id LEFT JOIN hd_driver d2 ON va.driver_id_2 = d2.id ORDER BY v.route_no, v.vehicle_id

SELECT id, name, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM hire_date) * 1000 AS hire_date FROM hd_driver WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT driver_id_1 FROM hd_vehicle_assignment WHERE driver_id_1 IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT driver_id_2 FROM hd_vehicle_assignment WHERE driver_id_2 IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY hire_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hd_vehicle_assignment (vehicle_id, driver_id_1, driver_id_2, updated_by) VALUES (#{vehicleId}, #{driverId1}, #{driverId2}, #{updatedBy}) ON CONFLICT (vehicle_id) DO UPDATE SET driver_id_1 = #{driverId1}, driver_id_2 = #{driverId2}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}
